channel.title: Photography on Braeden Silver - Portfolio and Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Photography on Braeden Silver - Portfolio and Blog

item.title: Macro Photography: A Beginner's Guide to Gear, Focus Stacking, and Techniques
item.description: Macro Photography: A Beginner’s Guide to Gear, Focus Stacking, and Techniques Macro photography is the art of capturing the tiny, often-overlooked details of the world around us. From the intricate textures of a dragonfly’s wing to the fine details of everyday objects, macro photography allows you to see the world up close like never before. In this guide, we’ll cover macro photography basics, essential gear recommendations, lighting setups, focus stacking software, lens suggestions, and popular genres to help you get started on your macro journey.
